title: VSCode Extension Commands
description: Commands exposed by the SpecGofer extension for Claude Code terminal integration

commands.title: Start Claude Code Terminal
commands.description: Launch Claude Code in external terminal for the selected specification

parameters.name: specId
parameters.description: ID of the specification to execute

commands.title: Stop Claude Code Terminal
commands.description: Terminate the running Claude Code terminal session

commands.title: View Terminal Output
commands.description: Open the output channel showing Claude Code terminal activity

commands.title: Configure WhatsApp Escalation
commands.description: Set up WhatsApp phone number for escalations

parameters.name: phoneNumber
parameters.description: WhatsApp phone number in E.164 format

commands.title: Test WhatsApp Connection
commands.description: Send a test message to verify WhatsApp configuration

commands.title: View Escalation History
commands.description: Show recent escalations and their resolutions

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of history to show

contexts.description: Whether a Claude Code terminal session is currently running
Number of sessions queued for execution

specgofer.claudeCode.autoResponse.description: Automatically respond to Claude Code questions when confident

specgofer.claudeCode.escalationTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for WhatsApp escalations

specgofer.claudeCode.whatsAppNumber.description: WhatsApp phone number for escalations (E.164 format)

specgofer.claudeCode.bufferSize.description: Maximum lines to keep in terminal output buffer
